ThingDef.label: failed compound
ThingDef.description: A dead-end compound. It does nothing useful and only makes the patient sick.

li.revealedDescription: A dead-end compound. It does nothing useful and only makes the patient sick. Identified by testing.

ThingDef.label: fatal compound
ThingDef.description: A catastrophic compound. It kills whoever takes it.

li.revealedDescription: A catastrophic compound. It kills whoever takes it. Identified by testing, at a cost.

ThingDef.label: inert compound
ThingDef.description: A stable but biologically inert compound. It does nothing at all when administered.

li.revealedDescription: A stable but biologically inert compound. It does nothing at all when administered. Identified by testing.

ThingDef.label: refinement sample
ThingDef.description: A proof-of-concept dose. Testing it teaches the colony how to refine existing drugs into graded variants.

li.revealedDescription: A proof-of-concept dose. Testing it teaches the colony how to refine existing drugs into graded variants. Identified by testing.
